summary: Excellent soundboard capture of a juicy 1985 show, featuring a smoking Space and an epic Estimated jam that launches into Neverland.
review: The recording is praised for its bright, clean sound and flawless mastering by Charlie Miller, making it one of the best‚Äësounding tapes from this run. Musically the concert shines with a fat first set and a second set packed with standout moments ‚Äì Space, an inspired Estimated/Neverland jam, and seamless segues through Touch, Morning Dew, Throwing Stones and more.

ai_rating.rationale: All three reviewers gave high marks (average 4.7 stars) and highlighted both superb musical performance and excellent soundboard quality, with consistent praise and no major criticisms.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Bright, clean, crisp sound; Charlie Miller‚Äôs mastering called "exactly perfect"; reviewers note no drop‚Äëouts or muddiness.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The set flows smoothly with tight segues, especially the second‚Äëset suite Touch‚ÜíEstimated‚ÜíEyes‚ÜíDrums‚ÜíMorning Dew‚ÜíThrowing Stones‚ÜíLovelight. Reviewers note a slightly brisk tempo but overall fine form throughout.

band_member_comments.Bob: Bob's vocal on Estimated is highlighted as a key element of the jam that rockets into Neverland.
band_member_comments.Keys: Keyboard work (Healy/Brent) praised for bright, clean tone and driving the Estimated jam.
